content.body:
Next TG5 meeting will be held on **Wednesday 24th of June**.
Link to the agenda: https://github.com/tc39/tg5/blob/main/agendas/2026/2026-06-24.md

_Please note that there is no TG5 meeting in May, due to the proximity to the recently held TG5 Workshop in Delft._
